Bash(PGPASSWORD=123456 psql -h localhost -U postgres -d strategy_platform -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM trading_signals; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM research_reports; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM users; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM backtest_tasks;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=123456 psql -h localhost -U postgres -d strategy_platform -c "
SELECT s.id, s.strategy_id, st.name as strategy_name, s.pair, s.direction, s.confidence_score, s.signal_at 
FROM trading_signals s 
JOIN strategies st ON s.strategy_id = st.id 
ORDER BY s.signal_at DESC LIMIT 10;" 2>&1)
Bash(PGPASSWORD=123456 psql -h localhost -U postgres -d strategy_platform -c "\\d trading_signals;" 2>&1)
Bash(PGPASSWORD=123456 psql -h localhost -U postgres -d strategy_platform -c "\\d strategies;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=123456 psql -h localhost -U postgres -d strategy_platform -c "
SELECT s.name, ts.pair, ts.direction, COUNT\(*\) as cnt
FROM trading_signals ts
JOIN strategies s ON ts.strategy_id = s.id
GROUP BY s.name, ts.pair, ts.direction
ORDER BY s.name, ts.pair, ts.direction;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=123456 psql -h localhost -U postgres -d strategy_platform -c "
SELECT s.name, COUNT\(*\) as signals, 
       COUNT\(DISTINCT ts.pair\) as pairs,
       MIN\(ts.signal_at\)::date as from_date,
       MAX\(ts.signal_at\)::date as to_date
FROM trading_signals ts
JOIN strategies s ON ts.strategy_id = s.id
GROUP BY s.name
ORDER BY s.name;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=123456 psql -h localhost -U postgres -d strategy_platform -c "
-- 看看某个策略的连续信号是不是重复的
SELECT signal_at, pair, direction, entry_price, confidence_score
FROM trading_signals 
WHERE strategy_id = 4  -- MacdTrendFollowing（信号最少的）
AND pair = 'BTC/USDT'
ORDER BY signal_at
LIMIT 20;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=123456 psql -h localhost -U postgres -d strategy_platform -c "
-- 看布林带策略是否有连续重复方向
SELECT signal_at, pair, direction, entry_price
FROM trading_signals 
WHERE strategy_id = 2  -- Bollinger
AND pair = 'BTC/USDT'
ORDER BY signal_at
LIMIT 20;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=123456 psql -h localhost -U postgres -d strategy_platform -c "
-- 确认不再有连续相同方向的信号
SELECT signal_at, pair, direction, entry_price
FROM trading_signals 
WHERE strategy_id = 2 AND pair = 'BTC/USDT'
ORDER BY signal_at LIMIT 15;
" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=123456 psql -h localhost -U postgres -d strategy_platform -c "
SELECT s.name, 
       COUNT\(*\) as total,
       COUNT\(DISTINCT ts.pair\) as pairs,
       SUM\(CASE WHEN ts.direction='buy' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as buys,
       SUM\(CASE WHEN ts.direction='sell' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as sells,
       MIN\(ts.signal_at\)::date as from_dt,
       MAX\(ts.signal_at\)::date as to_dt
FROM trading_signals ts
JOIN strategies s ON ts.strategy_id = s.id
GROUP BY s.name ORDER BY total DESC;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=123456 psql -h localhost -U postgres -d strategy_platform -c "
-- 每条信号都绑定了：strategy_id（策略）+ pair（币种）+ timeframe（周期）
SELECT ts.id, s.name as strategy, ts.pair, ts.timeframe, ts.direction, ts.entry_price, ts.signal_at::date
FROM trading_signals ts
JOIN strategies s ON ts.strategy_id = s.id
ORDER BY RANDOM\(\) LIMIT 5;" 2>&1)

")

Bash(TEST_DATABASE_URL=postgresql+asyncpg://postgres:123456@localhost:5432/strategy_platform_test uv run python -c "
from tests.integration.conftest import _get_test_db_url, _derive_sync_url
from pathlib import Path
from alembic import command
from alembic.config import Config

url = _get_test_db_url\(\)
sync_url = _derive_sync_url\(url\)
project_root = Path\('.'\)
alembic_cfg = Config\(str\(project_root / 'alembic.ini'\)\)
alembic_cfg.set_main_option\('sqlalchemy.url', sync_url\)
alembic_cfg.set_main_option\('script_location', str\(project_root / 'migrations'\)\)
command.upgrade\(alembic_cfg, 'head'\)
print\('Alembic upgrade succeeded'\)
" 2>&1)

echo "=== Signals for strategy 1 \(FREE user, first signal\) ==="
curl -s "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/strategies/1/signals" -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
resp = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
signals = resp['data']['signals']
print\(f'Total signals returned: {len\(signals\)}'\)
if signals:
    sig = signals[0]
    print\('Fields present:', sorted\(sig.keys\(\)\)\)
    # Check VIP-restricted fields
    for field in ['stop_loss', 'take_profit', 'confidence_score', 'indicator_values']:
        print\(f'  {field}: {sig.get\(field, \\"MISSING\\"\)}'\)
"

echo ""
